name: Nelson Garage
principals: Randall K. Richter (VP); Lois Richter listed as key principal in business directories
service_types: school bus contracting; charter (T.A. Nelson Coach Lines affiliate)
districts_or_customers: Frazier School District; Connellsville-area routes; Geibel Catholic school services
recent_news: Listed at 170 Vanderbilt Rd as T.A. Nelson Bus Lines / Nelson Bus Lines; affiliate T.A. Nelson Coach Lines provides charter; no M&A news found.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (1951) family-run Western PA operator at 170 Vanderbilt Rd with school + charter affiliate; ~60-80 buses estimate; fits Summit's PA tuck-in profile though 'Nelson Garage' label likely a DBA/garage entity for T.A. Nelson Bus Lines.

name: PM Bus Inc
principals: Mark Tatalovic (President); Phillip M. Tatalovic (prior President, inactive)
districts_or_customers: Crawford County / Penncrest area school districts (Guys Mills, PA)
recent_news: No M&A news; family-run since 1975; succession from Phillip to Mark Tatalovic noted in directory listings.
fit_notes: Second-generation family operator in NW PA; transition Phillip -> Mark Tatalovic suggests potential succession event; reported employee figure (125) likely overstated vs D&B (~10), so fleet size uncertain; viable PA tuck-in.

name: Star & Strand Transportation
principals: John M. Schneider (CEO, legacy); acquired by STA October 2025
districts_or_customers: Rensselaer and Albany counties; Troy-area districts in NY Capital Region
recent_news: ACQUIRED by Student Transportation of America in October 2025 as part of STA's $100M+ acquisition program; not an independent target.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET - already owned by STA (Summit competitor). Remove from tuck-in pipeline; useful only as competitive intel on STA's NY Capital Region footprint.

name: Penny Transportation
principals: Phillip (Philip) Benowitz (Owner/CEO); affiliated entities B&F Skilled Inc. and Smart Pick Transportation
service_types: school bus; special-needs/employee transport (NYC OPT contractor)
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE / Office of Pupil Transportation routes in Brooklyn
recent_news: DOT-registered with 44 power units / 45 drivers; 50-year independent NYC operator; no M&A news identified.
fit_notes: 50-year independent NYC yellow-bus contractor with affiliated B&F Skilled and Smart Pick entities suggesting roll-up potential; Brooklyn footprint aligns with Summit's NYC OPT expansion; succession may be near (founder-led since 1974).

name: Xna Ruberi School Bus
principals: Ana L. Ruberi (Owner) - 'Xna' likely a data-feed artifact of 'Ana'
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade private/magnet schools; not confirmed on M-DCPS approved list
recent_news: No public web footprint located; not found on Miami-Dade approved private bus company list reviewed; very small operator if active.
fit_notes: Minimal public presence; data-feed name 'Xna Ruberi' likely 'Ana Ruberi' / family micro-operator. Reported 72 employees / $3.2M revenue likely overstated. Low priority - too small / unverified to be a viable Summit tuck-in.
